title: camellia saluenensis var. minor
intro: Camellia saluenensis var. minor, also known as the Yunnan tea plant, is a variety of the Camellia sinensis plant, which is the primary source of tea leaves. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Camellia saluenensis var. minor include reducing cholesterol levels, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Camellia saluenensis var. minor is typically used in herbal preparations such as tea infusions, which can be consumed hot or cold to reap its medicinal benefits.
